calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-20-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Garofalo (executor) in Propria Persona.

The Court addressed Mr. Garofalo stating that by now he should have filed for final distribution, that this matter was on calendar July 26, 2016 and nothing had been filed an no appearance was made on that date and asked why. Mr. Garofalo stated that he has the petition with him to be filed after the hearing, that there were delays in the estate but agreed that it should have been done, Mr. Garofalo apologized to the court for the delay, that he had never received a prior notice to appear, that he did receive an email from the examiner a couple of days prior to the hearing but was out of town and that he had tried to call in to make a telephone appearance the day of the hearing but it was too late. The Court stated that it is his responsibility to get this finished. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to September 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the petition will be filed and that this status will go off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Aug-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Personal Representative Paul L. Garofalo to appear on August 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed and to explain his failure to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
